code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, sign * val)
          in_num = false
          sign = 1
          val = 0
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if b == 43
        in_num = true
      else
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for x in xs
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums1
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end
for x in nums2
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut output = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    output = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    output = "#{output} #{x}"
  end
end
println(output)
